message:
feat(brenner-loop): implement HypothesisCard interface & validation

Implements brenner_bot-an1n.1 - the foundational data model for the
Brenner Loop hypothesis engine.

- Create HypothesisCard interface with discriminative structure:
  - predictionsIfTrue/False, impossibleIfTrue (falsification conditions)
  - version tracking with parentVersion and evolutionReason
  - confidence tracking (0-100 numeric scale)
  - structured confounds with IdentifiedConfound type
- Add comprehensive validation functions with detailed error messages
- Add type guards: isHypothesisCard(), isIdentifiedConfound()
- Add factory functions: createHypothesisCard(), evolveHypothesisCard()
- Add utility functions for falsifiability/specificity scoring

The key Brenner insight operationalized: the impossibleIfTrue field
forces users to articulate what would disprove their hypothesis.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+/**
+ * Brenner Loop Module
+ *
+ * Core data models and utilities for the Brenner Loop hypothesis engine.
+ * This module provides the foundational types for discriminative hypothesis testing.
+ *
+ * @module brenner-loop
+ */
+
+// Re-export everything from hypothesis module
+export {
+  // Core interfaces
+  type HypothesisCard,
+  type IdentifiedConfound,
+
+  // Validation types
+  type ValidationResult,
+  type ValidationError,
+  type ValidationWarning,
+  type ValidationErrorCode,
+  type ValidationWarningCode,
+
+  // Validation functions
+  validateHypothesisCard,
+  validateConfound,
+
+  // Type guards
+  isHypothesisCard,
+  isIdentifiedConfound,
+
+  // Factory functions
+  generateHypothesisCardId,
+  generateConfoundId,
+  createHypothesisCard,
+  evolveHypothesisCard,
+
+  // Utility functions
+  calculateFalsifiabilityScore,
+  calculateSpecificityScore,
+  interpretConfidence,
+} from "./hypothesis";
